notes: Python 1.5.13 — bundle-pipeline regression fix: prior 1.5.10/1.5.11/1.5.12 DMGs shipped stale 1.5.9 bundled-python because npm run build skipped scripts/bundle-python.sh. 1.5.13 chains bundle-python.sh + adds release-time version-drift guard (bundled vmlx_engine.__version__ must match package.json). Also drops the DSV4-only 512-token paged-cache short-prompt skip so DSV4-Flash uses the same paged-cache eligibility rules as every other family. DSV4 instant-load (sidecar fast path) and HSA/CSA/SWA combo paged/L2 cache from 1.5.12 are now actually present in the shipped DMG.
